title: AntWorks
description: An idle ant colony sim — assign foragers, grow the nursery, buy upgrades, prestige for permanent bonuses, and export your save.
concept: A management idle game where you direct a living ant colony rendered on an animated canvas cross-section. Assign idle ants to forage food, forage wood, or tend the nursery; spend resources on four upgrade buildings; unlock a prestige loop that resets the colony for permanent Royal Jelly multipliers; and the colony keeps producing while you're away, with an offline-progress summary on return.
features: Three assignable ant roles (forage food, forage wood, nursery) with live rate readouts
Four purchasable upgrade buildings with exponentially scaling costs (storage, tunnels, farm terrace, woodyard)
Prestige system: reset for permanent Royal Jelly production multipliers, unlocked at 40 total ants born
Offline progress simulation with a welcome-back summary toast
Export save as downloadable JSON + import save from file, plus a full-reset option
Animated canvas colony view — ants travel curved paths between nest and resource patches with deposit particle effects
Keyboard shortcuts (1/2/3 to assign, Shift+1/2/3 to unassign)

interaction.mouse: Click +/- steppers to assign ants to roles; click Build to purchase upgrades; click Prestige/Export/Import in the Colony tab
interaction.click: Tap tab buttons (Roles/Build/Colony) to switch panels
interaction.touch: All controls are large touch targets; canvas view is passive/observational
interaction.keyboard: 1/2/3 assigns one idle ant to Food/Wood/Nursery role; Shift+1/2/3 unassigns
